title: Keyed critical issue with a well-formed key and Handler: prompt
body:
A null check is missing before the property access, so a malformed payload throws instead of failing gracefully.

<!-- gaia-debt-key: v1 class=holistic/unclassified path=app/foo.ts line=4 -->

Handler: prompt

title: Malformed-key issue missing the line field
body:
The key comment below was hand-edited and lost its line field, so it cannot parse as a key.

title: Keyless human-filed issue with no severity and no handler
body: A human filed this directly, describing a slow query on the reports page, with no dedup key and no handler line.
